/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_runner.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_runner.dir/test_runner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_runner.dir/integration_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_runner.dir/__/src/config/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_runner.dir/__/src/judge/status.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_runner.dir/__/src/judge/sandbox.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_runner.dir/__/src/judge/judge_engine.cpp.o -o test_runner  -lspdlog -lfmt
